items.claim: Conor McGregor's fighting style is based on speed and timing, which are the first attributes to decline.
items.quote: He has a game that's based off of speed and timing, and those are the first things to go.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive from professional competition for five years.
items.quote: And Conor's been out for 5 years.

items.claim: Max Holloway is currently utilizing a more frequent kicking game than he has in the past.
items.quote: Max Holloway's kicking more than ever.

items.claim: Max Holloway's improved durability is linked to no longer having to cut weight.
items.quote: Max's chin is going to be a lot better now that he doesn't have to cut any weight

items.claim: Conor McGregor's team will likely avoid a wrestle-heavy game plan to prevent him from exhausting his gas tank.
items.quote: His team does not want him to run out of gas. They're going to want Conor to put the left hand on him. And if he's going to put the touch of death on him, he's probably going to set it up with some [ __ ] but lots of takedowns wouldn't be it.

items.claim: Max Holloway is difficult to outscore in a decision.
items.quote: you can't really outscore Max to decision.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's rapid turnaround between his second and third fights against Dustin Poirier was a strategic mistake.
items.quote: The The turnaround was way too quick, January to July. That made no sense either.
